perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the top of the cabinet and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: Target = the akita_black_bowl ELEVATED on top of the wooden_cabinet (one of two identical bowls; disambiguated by elevation, not by name).
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot tends to pick the table-level bowl (training prior); perception hybrid finds the elevated bowl by reading world_NN.npy and picking the one with z>cabinet_top.
strategy_notes: Localization: agentview heightmap scan of world_00.npy found one elevated cluster (z>1.16) at rows 97-128 / cols 0-29 with peak z=1.181 — clearly the bowl on the cabinet (cabinet top z=1.13, bowl rim z=1.18). Median agentview pixel sample on bowl gave world xy=(0.019,-0.268). Pre-positioned at (0.02,-0.27,1.25), then wrist-cam refinement: sampled 6 pixels inside bowl rim in world_wrist_01.npy gave median xy=(0.067,-0.280) — wrist override agentview (lower z, ±1-2cm precision). Re-centered to (0.07,-0.28,1.23). Pi0 grasp succeeded (peak_lift=0.175m, final_gripper_opening=0.015 = holding object; wrist cam after grasp showed bowl interior in gripper and empty cabinet top). Plate localized in agentview at world (0.06, 0.21, z=0.91) via region-detection of slightly-elevated pixels (0.905<z<0.93) — the 1383-px region on the +y side was the plate. Placement used bowl-eef y-offset feedback: eef_y_target = plate_y + 0.045 = 0.255. Carried via intermediate (0.04, 0.10, 1.20), then descent to (0.06, 0.255, 1.03). Release fired libero_terminated=true on opening step 1.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: Pick the akita black bowl on the top of the cabinet and place it on the plate
pick_result.comment: pi0_pick.success=false is the heuristic (descent_done=false), but gripper_opening=0.015 + wrist-cam confirmation showed the bowl was actually grasped and lifted 17cm — proven by subsequent release firing libero_terminated=true.
